evidence: V expressed excitement to learn from actual practitioners in a space he had only theorized about

Vrijen explained the language is mostly humor but acknowledged it might serve as a defense mechanism. He described oscillating between viewing behaviors neutrally versus labeling them as 'bad' on less disciplined days
notes: L3 Spark - personal reflection on self-perception

evidence: DECISION: Focus sales efforts on B2B market—organizations, school districts, and clinics—rather than individual consumers... organizational purchasing enables supporters/teachers/students to use for free via employer-paid access
notes: L3 Spark - learning from Chris's GTM approach

evidence: Chris revealed he's been building his edtech product for almost a year... Primary GTM is organizational sales via quote requests
Vrijen, currently receiving executive function coaching from Chris's colleague Heather
notes: Professional relationship supporting V's executive function

evidence: Core message: 'We are a great solution because we collect first-party data'... Positioning: Careerspan as a 'human data company'
notes: Evolves data-as-ore into concrete market positioning - from metaphor to tagline

evidence: Video demo should be 'human data oriented' — show the data collection, then the results
Hook: 'This moment in time is important' (regulatory pressure on third-party data)... Reference to Eightfold lawsuit — positioning against publicly scraped data risks
Key differentiator: opted-in, first-party candidate data... Use regulatory moment (Eightfold lawsuit) as urgency driver
notes: Expands enrichment-layer into compliance/legal risk narrative

evidence: Logan's insight: 'Why don't we make a 30-second look at the information we capture via Careerspan?' Shift from explaining to showing — visual demonstration over word-heavy explanations
A deck is not as impactful as watching it in action... 45-60 second demo video instead of pitch deck for outreach
Two distinct video/message versions: 1. Sourcing/Matching/External Hiring — for recruiting teams 2. Internal Mobility — for enterprise HR/L&D
Internal strategy session between V and Logan to develop outreach collateral for Careerspan's go-to-market push
